channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Loblaw confirms data breach - Canadian retail giant says 'basic customer information' affected
item.description: Hackers access "non-critical part of the IT network" at Loblaw, and stole names, emails, and phone numbers.

item.title: Test du Cosori Iconic Single : inox et céramique, une combinaison idéale pour une cuisine saine
item.description: Réputé pour ses appareils au design soigné, l'Américain Cosori monte en gamme avec l'Iconic Single. Arborant un look élégant et troquant le traditionnel revêtement en Téflon pour une cuve en céramique, ce modèle promet une cuisson aussi saine qu’efficace. Nous l'avons testé pendant plusieurs semaines pour vérifier si ses performances justifient son prix premium. ...

item.title: Full interview: Sonos CEO Tom Conrad explains why they built the new Sonos Play, how they're improving the app after its disaster, and what he thinks of Dolby Atmos FlexConnect and the state of music streaming services
item.description: AV Insider: Digging into the background of Sonos' return to releasing speakers, plus the threat to its soundbars from Dolby Atmos FlexConnect

item.title: Who needs a Chromebook? This £280 HP Windows 11 laptop deal is perfect for students and working from home in Amazon's Spring sale
item.description: This HP Windows 11 laptop is perfect for students and remote & hybrid workers and it's under £280 in Amazon's spring sale.

item.title: ‘Stranger Things’ Star Gaten Matarazzo’s New Movie Is an Even Stranger Trip
item.description: In 'Pizza Movie,' he and 'Goldbergs' star Sean Giambrone get super high and turn a pizza delivery into a sci-fi horror comedy.

item.title: D-Link D501 review: This 5G travel router made me wish for better local 5G connectivity, because without it, this is an expensive LTE dongle
item.description: The D-Link D501 is a 5G USB dongle made for home and small-business use that doesn’t require drivers or special ports.

item.title: Apple Studio Display XDR Review: Too Much but Not Enough
item.description: The Studio Display XDR monitor comes at a time when HDR-capable screens are everywhere. Apple still does it best, but at a hefty cost.

item.title: The wild six weeks for NanoClaw’s creator that led to a deal with Docker
item.description: Gavriel Cohen is living an open source developer's dream as his project has achieved acclaim and a partnership with Docker in a matter of weeks.

item.title: 'We have no plans for additional DLCs or expansions' — CD Projekt Red shuts down a 'secret' Cyberpunk 2077 content drop, but is remaining suspiciously quiet amid Witcher 3 expansion rumors
item.description: CD Projekt Red has declared there are no plans for more Cyberpunk 2077 content amid ongoing rumors that a new expansion for The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is on the horizon.

item.title: ‘I don’t think a company can dictate to a sovereign government what it does with its tools’: Dell CEO answers question on Anthropic’s feud with the Pentagon
item.description: Dell CEO says companies don't have the right to dictate how the governments use their technology.

item.title: Spotify will let you edit your Taste Profile to control your recommendations
item.description: When you edit your Taste Profile, you'll impact your personalized playlists like Discover Weekly, recommendations, and Wrapped.

item.title: Amazon fait sa grande braderie du week-end : voici les meilleures offres en DIRECT des ventes flash de printemps
item.description: Comme chaque année, Amazon fête l'arrivée du printemps avec des ventes flash étalées sur plusieurs jours, l'occasion pour les petits férus de Tech que nous sommes de dénicher les meilleurs bons plans sur les smartphones, tablettes, PC portables... Voici nos recommandations !

item.title: Ninja’s star Creami ice cream maker is on sale for $169
item.description: If you’ve ever wanted more control over what goes into your ice cream, the Ninja Creami 5‑in‑1 Ice Cream Maker makes it easy. The ice cream maker lets you whip up dessert exactly as you want it from the comfort of your home, and right now it’s on sale for $169 ($30 off) at Walmart. […]

item.title: You can finally tell Spotify's algorithm to drop music you don't like and add in stuff you do in detail — the new change is the ‘next evolution’ of personalization
item.description: Spotify is rolling out a tool that lets you have full control over your Taste Profile, here's how your feedback tailors your recommendations.

item.title: Enceintes sono 2026 : la sélection des meilleures enceintes de soirées
item.description: Pour écouter votre musique à fond au bord de la piscine ou même organiser un karaoké, le tout sans se prendre la tête, l'enceinte de soirée est l'appareil idéal. Nous avons sélectionné pour vous les meilleures enceintes sono Bluetooth de soirée.

item.title: J’ai roulé 1 200 km en Porsche Macan GTS : la voiture électrique qui sait tout faire
item.description: J'ai essayé le nouveau Porsche Macan GTS sur 1 200 km, entre Nice et Paris. La version la plus orientée "plaisir de conduite" du SUV électrique est-elle à la hauteur de ses promesses sur petites routes ? Est-elle aussi bonne autoroutière que son aînée thermique ? Que vaut-elle au quotidien ? Voici mon expérience.

item.title: Parallels Desktop creators say MacBook Neo does indeed have enough muscle to run Windows apps
item.description: Parallels, the company best known for making the virtualization software that enables you to run Windows and other operating systems on a Mac, has confirmed that Parallels Desktop is compatible with the MacBook Neo. At launch it was unclear if Apple's new $600 laptop possessed the under-the-hood heft to run Windows apps, but in a recently updated post on its website, Parallels said that initial tests show its software running "stably," although performance is still being assessed. The MacBook Neo uses an A18 Pro chip, which debuted in the iPhone 16 Pro. However, as this chip is based on the sa...

item.title: Amazon : le prix de l’option pour supprimer la pub dans Prime Video augmente de 67 %
item.description: Il fallait s'y attendre : Amazon augmente le prix de l'accès sans pub à Prime Video. Certes, uniquement aux États-Unis pour le moment, mais le couperet ne devrait pas tarder ailleurs dans le monde. La hausse est vertigineuse !

item.title: Déploiement de la fibre optique : la France approche de l’objectif des 100 %, mais encore combien de temps avant d’y parvenir ?
item.description: Le déploiement de la fibre optique se poursuit toujours en France. Quand bien même la promesse d'une France 100 % fibrée en 2025 n'a pu être tenue, les opérateurs n'étaient pas si loin du but si on en croit le dernier rapport de l'Arcep sur le déploiement de la fibre optique.

item.title: Astronomers Watch in Amazement as 2 Planets Smash Into Each Other Around Nearby Star
item.description: The collision likely resembles the one that formed the Moon around 4.5 billion years ago.

item.title: I test office furniture for a living and this £255 FlexiSpot office chair and standing desk deal is the combo I’d buy in Amazon’s Spring Sale
item.description: FlexiSpot’s budget standing desk and chair are the ones I’d recommend if you’re kitting out your office.

item.title: I got tired of ChatGPT trying to bait me with follow-up questions after every answer — so I made this one easy change
item.description: A simple setting tweak and custom instruction can stop ChatGPT from ending every answer with follow-up prompts designed to keep the conversation going.

item.title: Tout juste dévoilés, Xiaomi les Redmi Buds 8 Pro avec ANC sont déjà à prix cassé lors des Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: Présentés au Mobile World Congress de Barcelone le 28 février 2026, les Xiaomi Redmi Buds 8 Pro ont impressionné grâce à leur réduction de bruit active jusqu’à 55 dB. Déjà accessibles, ils deviennent encore plus attractifs pendant les Ventes Flash

item.title: Beat the RAM price spike: Save £126 on 32GB of super-fast Corsair DDR5-6000 RAM in Amazon's Spring Sale
item.description: A rare win for PC builders, but the deal won't last for long.

item.title: ‘A new way to experience film cameras’ – this digital ‘film’ roll will take just seconds to upgrade your classic 35mm film camera with an APS-C sensor, 4K video and wireless uploads
item.description: 10 years in the making: I'm Back teases its latest digital 'film' roll with an APS-C sensor and 4K video, and I'm finally convinced the concept might work — here's why

item.title: Dreading the clocks changing? I recommend this fantastic Sage coffee machine for chasing the fatigue away – and it’s now available for its lowest price this whole decade
item.description: This fuss-free Sage espresso machine isn’t just one of my favourite coffee makers – it’s also available at a lower price than any other point since 2019.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg’s Billion-Dollar Hiring Spree Doesn’t Seem to Be Going So Great
item.description: The rollout of the company’s new AI model is reportedly being pushed back due to performance concerns.

item.title: The best iPhone 17 Pro case is back on sale — I'd buy one if I didn't already have one
item.description: The Mujjo Leather Case for iPhone 17 Pro is my favourite iPhone case of them all — and it's on sale now at Amazon.

item.title: The $32B acquisition that one VC is calling the ‘Deal of the Decade’
item.description: According to Index Ventures Partner Shardul Shah, cybersecurity startup Wiz sits “at the center of three tailwinds: AI, cloud, and security spend.” Those tailwinds powered what just became the largest venture-backed acquisition in history — Google’s $32 billion deal, finalized after a declined 2024 offer, antitrust review on both sides of the Atlantic, and an […]...

item.title: Veeam says critical security flaws may be exposing backup servers to RCE attacks
item.description: Veeam patches three critical-severity flaws and two high-severity issues.

item.title: Fin du silicium pour les panneaux solaires ? Cette nouvelle centrale solaire au pérovskites en Chine pourrait tout changer
item.description: Une installation solaire d’un mégawatt n’est pratiquement rien face aux immenses champs photovoltaïques que l’on peut observer en Chine. Mais une telle centrale devient vite intéressante quand on sait qu’elle est constituée de modules pérovskites, technologie que l’on pensait encore être au stade des laboratoires.

item.title: 18 of my most most-wanted Lego deals in the Amazon spring sale — up to 33% off Star Wars, Lord of the Rings, and Harry Potter sets
item.description: Suddenly, all I need in my life is a 5,471-piece Barad-dûr with a light-up Eye of Sauron.

item.title: The search for affordable kids’ TV ends right here with this DIRECTV deal
item.description: Unlock Disney+, Nick, and more with DIRECTV MyKids for $14.99/mo.

item.title: 'I am extremely angry!' — Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones (2nd Gen) reportedly lost key features after a firmware update, and users aren't OK
item.description: Users say a Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones 2nd Gen firmware update has removed key features — here's what to do if you feel the same

item.title: Le FBI enquête sur des jeux vérolés distribués par Steam
item.description: Steam n'est pas immunisé contre les malwares. Bien au contraire : le FBI a même lancé un appel aux victimes potentielles de plusieurs jeux vérolés. Derrière ces attaques se cacherait une seule et même opération malveillante.

item.title: X could be breaching US sanctions on Iran, watchdog warns
item.description: The newly verified X account for Iran's supreme leader could be putting the company on the wrong side of US sanctions, according to a watchdog group. The Tech Transparency Project, which last month published a report on X granting premium perks to sanctioned officials in Iran, now says that the verified account for the country's new leader raises fresh questions about the issue. The TTP notes that the X account for Iran's new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, appears to be paying for an X premium subscription despite being on the US government's list of sanctioned individuals since 2019. As th...

item.title: Les ventes de deux-roues électriques s’effondrent : voici les chiffres qui font mal
item.description: Rouler en deux-roues électriques n'est vraiment pas un luxe que vous êtes prêts à vous payer ! Les modèles neufs de motos et de scooters à batterie sont boudés par les acheteurs alors que les thermiques se vendent mieux. On vous montre les chiffres exclusifs.

item.title: The ‘Biologically Implausible’ Case of the Woman Who Sneezed Maggots
item.description: The woman started to see "worms" come out of her nose, doctors in Greece reported.

item.title: Cette application anti-porno a laissé fuiter les secrets inavouables de ses utilisateurs
item.description: Pensée pour aider les hommes à se libérer de leur dépendance à la pornographie, l'application américaine Quittr se retrouve au cœur d'un scandale retentissant. Derrière ses promesses de développement personnel et son marketing très agressif, le service a laissé fuiter les confessions et les habitudes inavouables de centaines de milliers d'internautes....

item.title: 1300 nits, 240 Hz, OLED, 6,4 mm d’épaisseur : l’écran PC de TCL est une claque visuelle
item.description: 1300 nits, 240 Hz et une épaisseur de seulement 6,4 mm. TCL vient d'annoncer le 32X3A, son tout premier moniteur gaming OLED. Le constructeur chinois sort enfin les muscles pour bousculer un marché jusque-là dominé par les dalles de ses concurrents directs, LG et Samsung.

item.title: A Paranormal Podcast Comes to Life In the Simple, Scary Film, ‘Undertone’
item.description: A24's new film stars Nina Kiri in a horror tale from writer-director Ian Tuason. It's now in theaters.

item.title: Pourquoi s'établir sur Mars ou la Lune changerait notre biologie bien au-delà de ce qu'on imagine
item.description: À l’aube d’une nouvelle ère d’exploration spatiale, le programme Artemis de la Nasa ouvre la voie à un retour des Américains sur la Lune, tout en posant les jalons des premières missions vers Mars. Alors que les projets de colonisation de ces nouveaux horizons prennent forme, la perspective de...

item.title: 'There are so many hypotheticals': Spider-Verse producers reveal whether they'd be interested in being the Kevin Feige of the Sony Spider-Man Universe reboot
item.description: The creative minds behind the Spider-Verse films react to potentially being asked to lead the Sony Spider-Man Universe revival.

item.title: OpenAI’s first artist-in-residence is launching a new company to turn your ideas into products
item.description: Entrepreneur and roboticist Alexander Reben announces Phyzify, an AI company that aims to build the ‘infrastructure for your imagination.’ OpenAI’s first artist in residence is launching a new company that aims to turn your thoughts into actual products. Today, entrepreneur and roboticist Alexander Reben announces Phyzify, a lab using AI tools to rapidly prototype physical objects based on your imagination....

item.title: Grammarly’s AI tool mimicked experts without their consent. Now it’s being sued
item.description: Grammarly’s new ‘Expert Review’ feature generated editing tips attributed to well-known writers and journalists. Grammarly, the tool meant to assist with spelling, grammar, and in identifying plagiarism, is being sued for a new AI tool called “Expert Review.” The tool offers editing suggestions from established authors and writers—ostensibly not a bad idea—except that none of those people consented to being involved in the first place. ...

item.title: Amazon Prime Video nearly doubles the price to go ad-free and stream 4K video
item.description: Starting April 10th, Amazon Prime Video's ad-free subscription add-on will be rebranded as Ultra as its price increases to $4.99 per month from the current $2.99. Once it launches, it will also be the "exclusive" plan with access to 4K/UHD streaming, removing 4K streaming access from Prime subscribers who don't pay extra. Paying the extra […]

item.title: Le Galaxy S26 Ultra est plus résistant que son prédécesseur, la preuve en vidéo
item.description: Le célèbre vidéaste JerryRigEverything soumet le Galaxy S26 Ultra à ses tests de résistance extrêmes et le smartphone s'en sort très bien.

item.title: Directive 8020 will let up to five players play local couch co-op in Supermassive Games' returning Movie Night mode, and the latest trailer demonstrates just how intense it will be
item.description: Supermassive Games has shared a new live-action trailer for its next horror game, Directive 8020, highlighting the game's couch co-op mode.

item.title: Higher Jet Fuel Prices Could Melt Your Summer Travel Plans
item.description: Airline ticket prices are already rising, but an extended crisis in Iran could have bigger effects on the global travel industry.

item.title: Stop what you're doing and check out this discount on the best gaming headset I have ever tested — the SteelSeries Arctis Nova Elite has a surprise price cut
item.description: This gaming headset deal deserves your attention.

item.title: ByteDance will reportedly buy NVIDIA's latest AI chips to use outside of China
item.description: TikTok's Chinese parent company ByteDance has figured out a way to access NVIDIA's latest AI chips despite export restrictions, according to a report by The Wall Street Journal. The company is working with a firm called Aolani Cloud and building out Blackwell computing systems in Malaysia. This should give ByteDance access to around 36,000 B200 chips. That's NVIDIA's most powerful processor. The hardware buildout will reportedly cost more than $2.5 billion. The company says it plans on using this new computing power for AI research and development outside of China. The country has been unable ...

item.title: Former DOGE employees give an inside look at the Elon Musk-led agency
item.description: Inexperienced employees at Elon Musk's DOGE used ChatGPT to cut anything they deemed as "DEI" from government spending.

item.title: The Big 12 basketball tournament is ditching slippery LED courts for hardwood
item.description: They may be great for fan engagement and selling ads, but the Big 12 has decided to replace the innovative glass-covered LED floors at Kansas City's T-Mobile Center with a traditional hardwood finish. It will be used for the remainder of the tournament during semifinal matches and the championship game. The LED floors, which were […]

item.title: Amazon just quietly dropped prices even further on Razer gaming peripherals — here are 9 unmissable deals with 40% or more off
item.description: I've scoured the Amazon Spring Sale for the best Razer gaming deals.

item.title: Le DJI Mini 3, petit drone 4K, voit son prix chuter pendant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: Amateurs de belles images aériennes, c’est le moment de craquer ! Pendant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon, le DJI Mini 3 voit son prix fondre à seulement 266 €, contre 379 € habituellement. Léger, facile à piloter et capable de filmer en 4K, ce petit drone devient une vraie affaire.
